body_txt: A character receives some shocking news while holding a (usually breakable and valuable) object. The news causes them to drop the object , and we follow it in close up with the camera overcranked (slow-motion shot) all the way to the floor. For extra credit, finish the shot with a slow-motion shot of the object shattering, with synchronized slow motion sound effects. For extra extra credit, throw in a Slow "NO!" and/or an attempted Desperate Object Catch while all of this is happening. Subtrope of Dramatic Drop . Compare with Slow-Motion Fall , Dramatic Shattering .
